title: More recipes
description: Added a lot of recipes for minecraft
body:
A datapack which added a lot of recipes for Minecraft.  
- apple  
- arrow  
- bed  
- beef  
- blaze rod  
- copper ingot  
- horse armor  
- dragon egg  
- elytra  
- enchanted golden apple  
- glow ink sac
- glow stone  
- gold ingot  
- iron ingot  
- leather 
- melon  
- nether wart  
- obsidian  
- saddle
- trident  
- sugar cane  
- totem   
- xp bottle
